issues.title: Test fixture missing interested_contact + owned_by
issues.attack: SubmissionForm requires candidate with owned_by=org and Contact with result=INTERESTED. Plan fixture creates bare candidate without these, so form validation fails before reaching success branch.
issues.response: Verified SubmissionForm.__init__ at forms.py:192 filters by interested contacts and owned_by. Must match test_p07 fixture pattern.

issues.title: Existing tests (test_p07) will break
issues.attack: test_p07_submissions.py line 745 asserts status_code==204 and HX-Trigger=='submissionChanged'. Multiple other assertions at lines 262, 310, 370, 408, 435 also expect 204.
issues.response: Confirmed existing tests check 204 status. Plan must update all affected assertions in test_p07_submissions.py.

issues.title: Step 4 self-contradictory
issues.attack: Step 4 says 'remove hx-target' then concludes 'no change needed'. Contradictory instructions for implementer.
issues.response: Rewrite Step 4 as clear no-op with explanation of HX-Retarget precedence.

issues.title: Code duplication with project_tab_submissions()
issues.attack: Plan copies exact queryset, status grouping, and render call from project_tab_submissions(). All 3 reviewers flagged independently (severity upgraded).
issues.response: Call project_tab_submissions(request, pk) directly and add HTMX headers to returned response.

issues.title: Weak tabChanged test — no JSON parsing
issues.attack: Test only checks 'tabChanged' string presence, doesn't verify JSON structure or activeTab value. 2/3 reviewers flagged (severity upgraded).
issues.response: Parse JSON, verify tabChanged.activeTab=='submissions', submissionChanged presence, and HX-Reswap.

issues.title: import json inside function body
issues.attack: PEP 8 violation: import json placed inside function. 2/3 reviewers flagged (severity upgraded from MINOR).
issues.response: Move import json to file top-level.

issues.title: Line number inaccuracy
issues.attack: Step 3 says 'line 1124' but actual code is at line 1162.

issues.title: Fragile string assertion
issues.attack: Testing for '추천 이력' in response is fragile if template text changes.
issues.response: '추천 이력' is a stable heading in tab_submissions.html:8. Standard pattern to verify correct template was rendered. If text changes, test should update to match.

issues.title: Overly split test methods
issues.attack: 4 tests repeat same POST request, wasting execution time.
issues.response: Separate methods provide clearer failure diagnostics. Consistent with project convention in test_p07.
